last_episode_to_air.name: The James Bond Clause
last_episode_to_air.overview: In London, Hal's actions cause friction as Kate heads to Paris with Dennison to get a handle on the Lenkov situation, which soon takes a shocking turn.

name: The Diplomat
overview: In the midst of an international crisis, a career diplomat lands in a high-profile job she’s unsuited for, with tectonic implications for her marriage and her political future.

production_companies.name: Let's Not Turn This Into a Whole Big Production

tagline: Keep your friends close. Keep your enemies closer.

episodes.name: The Cinderella Thing
episodes.overview: After a hostile attack on a British vessel, seasoned diplomat Kate Wyler assumes a new role in the UK that puts her skills — and marriage — to the test.

episodes.name: Don't Call It a Kidnapping
episodes.overview: As new details about the bombing emerge, Kate struggles to see eye-to-eye with Hal. Prime Minister Trowbridge's fiery remarks at a funeral cause a stir.

episodes.name: Lambs in the Dark
episodes.overview: At Winfield, President Rayburn's plans in the Gulf have the staff on edge as tensions between a determined Hal and a strong-willed Kate come to a head.

episodes.name: He Bought a Hat
episodes.overview: As Rayburn's rep takes a hit, Kate drops in on Dennison's private meeting at the UK Foreign Office and learns startling information about the attack.

episodes.name: The Dogcatcher
episodes.overview: Tempers flare at Chevening House, where an unexpected guest's arrival sends Kate and Dennison scrambling for a resolution. Hal makes a new connection.

episodes.name: Some Lusty Tornado
episodes.overview: To appease Trowbridge, Kate seeks Hal's help with a high-profile visitor and consults an informed source in secret as complicated feelings begin to grow.

guest_stars.character: Secretary of State Miguel Ganon's Aide
guest_stars.name: Waseem Mirza

episodes.name: Keep Your Enemies Closer
episodes.overview: After a sit-down with a Russian ambassador leads to new intel and mixed messages, Kate takes a trip to the Oval Office and reconnects with an old friend.

episodes.name: The James Bond Clause
episodes.overview: In London, Hal's actions cause friction as Kate heads to Paris with Dennison to get a handle on the Lenkov situation, which soon takes a shocking turn.
